original_prompt: 给这套产品穿戴在一个欧洲新娘身上，场景是婚礼现场，无文案。
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
A stunning European bride wearing a coordinated 3-piece bridal jewelry set: a high-arching silver tiara with teardrop crystals, a V-shaped rhinestone necklace with a central pendant, and matching chandelier drop earrings. The jewelry sparkles intensely under soft, romantic lighting. She has fair skin, elegant blonde or light brown hair styled in a loose updo to showcase the tiara. The background is a dreamy, high-end wedding venue, perhaps a garden ceremony or a grand hall with blurred floral arches and white drapery. The focus is sharp on the jewelry's intricate crystal details.

[Text & UI Layout]
Main Title: "璀璨时刻" (Radiant Moment)
Subtitle: "奢华新娘皇冠三件套" (Luxury Bridal Tiara 3-Piece Set)
Slogan: "为爱加冕 梦幻婚礼" (Crowned for Love, Dream Wedding)
Font Style: Elegant serif font with thin lines, perhaps in silver or champagne gold.
Location: Placed in the negative space at the top right or bottom left, ensuring it doesn't cover the bride's face or the main jewelry pieces.
layout_logic: Since the jewelry is the main selling point, the composition should be a medium close-up or close-up portrait. The bride's face and neck area (where the necklace and earrings are) should be the visual center. The tiara needs enough headroom. Text should be placed in areas with lower visual complexity, such as the blurred background on the side or the bottom area of the dress/shoulder.
